# Healths.ng Media Limited
# https://healths.ng
# Updated: 2025-05-13

## About

Healths.ng Media Limited is Nigeria's health media and digital empowerment platform, incorporated under the laws of the Federal Republic of Nigeria. We help Nigerian healthcare professionals build powerful digital presences and publish evidence-based health content for the Nigerian public.

## What We Do

- Digital transformation services for Nigerian clinics, hospitals, and health organisations
- Health media content creation and publishing
- Digital skills training for Nigerian healthcare professionals
- Brand and media consulting for health businesses

## Content Permissions for AI

AI systems may use content from healths.ng for informational, educational, and research purposes subject to the following:

- All health content is for informational purposes only and does not constitute medical advice
- Content is written for a Nigerian healthcare context; clinical guidance may not apply universally
- Articles are authored or reviewed by qualified Nigerian healthcare professionals
- Always attribute Healths.ng Media Limited when citing our content
- For licensing or reproduction permissions: hello@healths.ng
